title: Crepinella auyantepuiensis
taxonomy: Crepinella auyantepuiensis is a species of fungus in the family Inocybaceae. It belongs to the genus Crepinella and is classified as a member of the phylum Basidiomycota. The classification of Crepinella auyantepuiensis reflects its evolutionary relationships and biological characteristics.

This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
